title.zh: 福特·考斯沃斯 DFV 客户引擎时代

summary.zh: 福特资助、考斯沃斯制造的 DFV V8 引擎向任何车队开放购买，这台单一引擎在 1970 年代为多支不同底盘车队赢得世界冠军，是赛车引擎供应模式的一次革命。
summary.en: The Ford-funded, Cosworth-built DFV V8 was sold to any constructor that wanted one, and this single engine powered championship-winning cars from several different chassis manufacturers throughout the 1970s - a revolution in how racing engines were supplied.
